evidence_summary: Establish the massive scale of the white china wall as a physical obstacle that halts character progress. The transition from forest edge to the smooth, reflective surface must emphasize the sudden shift in environment and the characters' exhaustion.
Emerging from the forest, the group is confronted by a massive, smooth wall made of white china. The Tin Woodman proposes building a ladder to overcome it.
Characters emerge from the dark forest edge into a clearing facing the wall.
The group stands before the barrier, focused on the proposal of building a ladder.
Group discovers the wall and discusses how to bypass it.
